TargetName: Supply and install minimum 50000L cistern with necessary plumbing
Statement: DEL-014-01 implements SOW-0041: supply and install minimum 50000L cistern with necessary plumbing
Notes: FACT. Parent anchor — primary SOW item for cistern vessel scope. Confirmed in Decomposition §7 PKG-014 table and Scope Ledger.

TargetName: Install pump capable of 100 LPM with 2.5 inch cistern filling connection
Statement: DEL-014-01 implements SOW-0042: install pump capable of 100 LPM with 2.5 inch cistern filling connection for internal service water distribution
Notes: FACT. Parent anchor — primary SOW item for distribution pump scope. Confirmed in Decomposition §7 PKG-014 table and Scope Ledger.

TargetName: Deliver a code-compliant fully functional maintenance shop addition
Statement: DEL-014-01 supports OBJ-001: deliver a code-compliant fully functional maintenance shop addition that satisfies the Countys operational program
Notes: FACT. Trace anchor to project objective. Confirmed in Decomposition §7 PKG-014 table.

TargetName: Install and commission all mechanical plumbing and water storage systems to operational readiness
Statement: DEL-014-01 supports OBJ-004: install and commission all mechanical plumbing and water storage systems to operational readiness
Notes: FACT. Trace anchor to project objective. This is the primary operational readiness objective for this deliverable. Confirmed in Decomposition §7 PKG-014 table.

Statement: IFC plumbing drawings for cistern and pump details must be approved and issued before construction begins. P.Eng.-stamped drawings are a prerequisite for installation.
EvidenceQuote: IFC Plumbing Drawings (cistern and pump details) approved and issued | PKG-006 / DEL-006-04; RFP §3.3.2
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite stated in Procedure Prerequisites table. Design must precede construction.

Statement: Alberta Safety Code plumbing permit must be obtained before plumbing rough-in begins
EvidenceQuote: Alberta Safety Code plumbing permit obtained | DEL-009-03; RFP §3.3.2
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite stated in Procedure Prerequisites table. Permit gates construction start.

Statement: Building structure and utility room walls/slab must be constructed to stage required for cistern placement before cistern installation
EvidenceQuote: Building structure and utility room walls/slab constructed to stage required for cistern placement | PKG-011
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite stated in Procedure Prerequisites table. Cistern may need to be set before building closure.

Statement: Structural provisions for cistern loading (approx 50 metric tonne) must be confirmed by structural engineer before cistern placement
EvidenceQuote: Structural provisions for cistern loading confirmed by structural engineer | PKG-002
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite: structural clearance required for 50000L water load. Procedure and Guidance both state this.

Statement: Pump motor requires electrical power supply from DEL-015-01. Electrical rough-in for pump circuit must be complete or sequenced for connection.
EvidenceQuote: Electrical rough-in for pump circuit complete or sequenced | PKG-015 / DEL-015-01
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite and interface. Pump motor specs (voltage/amperage/starter) must be provided to electrical designer. Multiple sources confirm: Procedure Steps 1.3 and 3.3; Guidance Considerations; Datasheet Conditions; Specification Out of Scope.

Statement: The cistern is filled by the bulk water fill system (DEL-014-03). The 2.5 inch fill connection must be compatible with the bulk fill pump connection.
SourceRef: Guidance > Considerations > Coordination with Bulk Water Fill System
EvidenceQuote: The cistern is filled by the bulk water fill system. The fill inlet must be accessible from the external fill point
Notes: FACT. Explicit interface: cistern fill inlet coupling type and location must be compatible with DEL-014-03 bulk fill pump connection. Stated in Guidance Considerations; Procedure Steps 1.2 and 3.5; Datasheet Conditions and Construction.

Statement: Cistern overflow discharge routes to floor drain system (DEL-014-04). Interface for overflow pipe connection.
EvidenceQuote: Route overflow discharge to appropriate drain (floor drain system, DEL-014-04)
Notes: FACT. Explicit interface for overflow routing. Stated in Procedure Step 3.6; Guidance Considerations (Cistern Overflow); Datasheet Construction row.

Statement: Cistern commissioning sign-off to be completed in coordination with DEL-020-01 (Building Systems Commissioning). Commissioning documentation handed to commissioning agent.
EvidenceQuote: Complete commissioning checklist in coordination with DEL-020-01 (Building Systems Commissioning agent)
Notes: FACT. Explicit handover: commissioning checklist and documentation to DEL-020-01. Procedure Steps 5.1 and 5.2; Specification Documentation.

Statement: Cistern completion confirmation required for inclusion in CCC application
EvidenceQuote: Confirm cistern and distribution system is accepted as complete for inclusion in Construction Completion Certificate (CCC) application
Notes: FACT. Explicit handover: cistern completion status feeds CCC application. Procedure Step 6.4.

Statement: RFP §3.4 provides mandatory requirements for cistern volume (50000L) pump capacity (100 LPM) and filling connection (2.5 inch)
EvidenceQuote: The cistern shall have a minimum storage volume of 50,000 litres. Source: RFP §3.4
Notes: FACT. RFP §3.4 is the authoritative source for the three mandatory requirements (volume pump and connection). Already incorporated into specification requirements.

Statement: Plumbing conceptual drawing provides cistern location and distribution point layout required for installation planning
Notes: FACT. R-06 is the authoritative source for cistern location and distribution point layout. Referenced across all four source documents.
